owner_operator_stated: Dr. R. Aaron Eissens, DDS, bought this practice in November 2008 and operates it as Eissens Dental; his bio highlights a special interest in sleep dentistry / sleep apnea appliances.
notes: Record name 'Sleep Solutions of North Aurora PC' is not shown anywhere on the corroborated site, but the site's address (925 Oak St, North Aurora, IL 60542) and phone ((630) 906-9520) match the record exactly. Vendor hint eissensdental.com was correct as a physical-location match even though it presents itself under the general-dentistry brand 'Eissens Dental' rather than the record's sleep-medicine entity name -- likely a related billing/DBA entity for sleep-appliance services at the same office rather than a different practice, but no explicit statement links the two names. No careers/hiring page found.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Ahmad Zaidi, DMD, is stated to have founded/built the practice ('Dr. Ahmad Zaidi built this practice to give the Oswego, IL community a modern dental home...').
notes: Address (1301 Orchard Rd, Oswego, IL 60543) matches exactly and search results tie phone (630) 882-2996 to this practice as the 'current patients' line (the site's own listed number is a different (630) 984-8766 new-patient/front line for the same office). Vendor hint (villaparkdentist.com) did not corroborate; distinctivedental.com is the correct site. Hygienist 'Kristen' also listed on team page but not a dentist. No careers/hiring page found.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Erika L. Krouth, DDS, is the practice's namesake; search snippets note she opened the office in 2008 and purchased her own office condo in 2016.
notes: Address (1016 Douglas Rd, Oswego, IL 60543) and phone ((630) 554-5244) match exactly; vendor hint krouthdental.com was correct. Live site lists associate Dr. Hani Duong, DMD; a third-party directory snippet named a different associate (Dr. Brittany Shubert) not seen on the live site content -- may be outdated. No careers/hiring page found.

Address (13530 S. Route 59, Suite 120, Plainfield, IL 60544) and phone ((815) 436-1530) match exactly; vendor hint pinnacledentalgroup.com was correct. Site states the practice operates three offices (Plainfield, Clarendon Hills, New Lenox) -- a small multi-location group, not a single independent office. Dr. Justina Mockunas is the only named dentist on the homepage; owner vs associate role not stated. No careers/hiring page found.

Address (14955 S. Van Dyke Rd, Unit 100, Plainfield, IL 60544) and phone ((815) 436-4900) match exactly. Vendor hint (dentistinplainfield.com) is a different, unrelated Plainfield dental practice and did not corroborate -- dentalplainfield.com is the correct site. Dr. Moataz Salah, DDS, BDS, is the only named dentist; owner vs associate role not stated. No careers/hiring page found.

owner_operator_stated: Site's about section names practice leadership as 'Dr. Vlad Ferdkoff and Dr. Iriny Tadros'; there is no mention anywhere on the site of Rosemary Villa or a predecessor practice under her name.
notes: Street address matches (site lists 13621 South Route 59, Unit 103, Plainfield, IL 60544, vs record's 13621 s route 59) but the phone number on the live site (815-439-2400) does NOT match the record's (815) 673-7842, and none of the four dentists named on site (Ferdkoff, Grechko, Khatlan, Sethi; leadership section also cites Iriny Tadros) is Rosemary Villa. This reads as a successor/rebrand: 'Plainfield Dental Care' (multi-dentist group) now occupies the building/suite previously associated with the solo entity 'Villa, Rosemary DDS.' Third-party directories (dentalplans.com, Healthgrades, ADA Find-a-Dentist) still list Dr. Rosemary Villa's name at Plainfield-area addresses in search snippets, but within budget no live corroborating website under her name at this specific address/phone could be found -- treated as ownership_conflict per the successor rule rather than assuming she still operates here.
